shipping.free_threshold: Free standard shipping on orders over $50
shipping.tracking: Tracking number provided via email within 24 hours

returns.condition: Items must be unused and in original packaging
returns.exceptions: Final sale items cannot be returned

payments.security: All transactions are encrypted and PCI compliant
payments.installments: Available for orders over $100 via Klarna

warranty.standard: 1 year manufacturer warranty on all products
warranty.coverage: Covers defects in materials and workmanship

contact.response_time: Email responses within 4 hours during business hours
